codeReview.summary: The new integration suite covers most requested flows, but one test encodes an incorrect expectation for character-removal cascade cleanup and therefore does not fully validate the required persistence behavior.

issues.description: test_cascade_delete_full_flow asserts that the reloaded project has zero rejections after deleting char_a, but the setup also creates char_b and an unrelated rejection should remain if it does not reference the removed character. Character-removal cascade is scoped to dependent records only, so this expectation is stronger than the repository contract and does not faithfully verify VAL-CROSS-002.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for cross-area-tests. The feature is close, but the cascade-delete integration test has a blocking correctness issue because it expects all rejections to disappear after removing one character rather than verifying only dependent records are removed.
